title: cyclobalanus javensis
intro: Cyclobalanus javensis, also known as Java tea or Javan tea, is a type of plant native to the tropical forests of Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclobalanus javensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in digestion. Cyclobalanus javensis can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or tablet, and is also used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions.
